name: hackernews
label: Hacker News
description: Tech news and community discussion. Best for: recent releases, announcements, opinions, community reactions.

name: arxiv
label: arXiv
description: Research papers in CS, math, physics, and related fields. Results include HTML abstract pages and PDF download links.

name: github
label: GitHub
description: Open source repositories. Best for: finding projects, implementations, examples, and libraries.

name: stackoverflow
label: Stack Overflow
description: Programming Q&A. Best for: how-to questions, error messages, debugging help, code examples.

name: wikipedia
label: Wikipedia
description: General reference encyclopedia. Best for: concepts, background knowledge, definitions, history.

name: pkg-go-dev
label: Go Packages
description: Go package documentation and discovery. Best for: Go library APIs, module discovery, package usage.
